name: cc-compact-helper
description: Live Claude Code usage in a sidebar dashboard and status-bar item — 5-hour limit, cost, tokens, context fill. Fed by the status line, not transcript parsing.
author: Madushanka

commands.title: Claude Code Usage: Set Up Status-Line Bridge
Claude Code Usage: Open Sessions Folder
Claude Code Usage: Compact Now (send /compact to active terminal)

ccUsage.staleSeconds.description: Grey out the readout when no session has updated within this many seconds. The 5-hour countdown keeps ticking regardless.

ccUsage.activeWindowMinutes.description: Sessions updated within this many minutes count as active and are included in aggregated cost.

ccUsage.compactThresholdPercent.description: Suggest running /compact once a session's context fill reaches this percent. Drives the status-bar hint and the notification.

ccUsage.compactNotification.description: Pop a notification when context crosses the compact threshold (edge-triggered — fires once per crossing, not repeatedly). The status-bar hint shows regardless.

ccUsage.compactInstructions.markdownDescription: Preservation rules appended to the `/compact` command from the notification and the compact commands, e.g. `keep the open files, current task, and unresolved errors`. Leave empty for a plain `/compact`.

scripts.test: npm run compile && node test/test.js && node test/dashboard.test.js
